fix.item: Fixed missing font files in release package causing invisible text rendering.
Fixed reset functionality removing content fields such as headline, subtitle and selected article.
Fixed template text positioning issues in specific templates.
Fixed template default settings for consistent rendering.
Fixed nested settings handling for default logo and template parameters.

change.item: Improved template stability and rendering consistency across all templates.
Improved reset logic to affect only design-related settings.
Cleaned up release package structure and installer behavior.

security.item: Existing upload size and image dimension guards remain active.

addition.item: Added Back to Dashboard button in the Create Card view.

change.item: Prepared extension package for public release and update delivery through joomla.devart.gr.

security.item: Existing upload size and image dimension guards remain active.

addition.item: Added Breaking / Full Image social card template.
Added live preview and auto preview mode.
Added multiple social media output sizes.
Added default settings and logo configuration.

security.item: Added CSRF token protection for preview, generate and article loading actions.
Added upload file size and image dimension guards.
Added safe image type validation for JPG, PNG and WEBP.
